'''Marka Durn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] trader during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and a friend of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. With his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[R2-C9]], this expert navigator roamed the [[Nanth'ri Route]] in his battered [[Ghtroc Industries|Ghtroc]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], ''[[Deephopper|DeepHopper]]''.

==Treasure seeker==
[[Xishel]], a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]], once employed Durn to locate the lost treasure of the famous pirate, [[Celis Mott]]. Durn found the treasure on a remote asteroid, but was killed on Xishel's orders soon after. However, Durn hid the location of Mott's treasure in the databanks of his starship's computer and Xishel was foiled.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Treasure of Celis Mott|book=Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
